options.saveValidator: function(formData) { if(formData.name === 'proxy' || formData.name === 'logging' || formData.name === 'true' || formData.name === 'false' || formData.name === 'additional_parameters' || formData.name === 'additional_settings' || formData.name === 'ar_configuration') { return 'Can not create account named anyone of [proxy, logging, true, false, additional_parameters, additional_settings, ar_configuration]. These are reserved keywords.' ; } return true; }
